title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: Jordan Urbs reviews ZimaBoard 2, a paperback-sized server for running AI locally. The video demonstrates setting up OpenClaw with Venice AI and a Telegram bot for autonomous news briefings, highlighting sovereign AI stacks without vendor lock-in.
